debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
⊢ ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n

failed_attempts:
calc input.1.val + 2^n - (input.2.val + 1) < 2^(n+1) - 0 := by
                    gcongr
                    calc input.1.val + 2^n < 2^n + 2^n := by linarith
                         _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring; rw [pow_succ]
                    exact Nat.zero_le _
         · simp [heq]; exact h1
         · simp [ZMod.val_one]; exact h2p
       · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
         · simp [heq]; exact h1
         · simp [heq];
           calc input.1.val + 2^n >= 2^n := by linarith
                _ >= input.2.val + 1 := h2

    constructor
    · simp [sub_eq_add_neg]; exact h_val.right
    · rw [h_env, ← Nat.testBit_mod_two_pow, h_val.left]
      simp only [Nat.testBit_geq_pow_iff_and_lt_next_pow, h_val.right, and_true]
      split_ifs with h_lt
      · have : ¬(input.1.val > input.2.val) := by omega
        simp [this]
      · have : input.1.val > input.2.val := by omega
        simp [this]

end LessEqThan

· apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul
            rw [mul_two, ← pow_succ]
            exact h_bound
        rw [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, h_div]; simp [hle]

end LessEqThan
EqThan

x.val + 2^n < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
            _ = 2^(n+1) := by rw [pow_succ, two_mul]
            _ < p := hn
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · simp only [heq, hy_val]; omega
        · simp only [heq]
          calc
            x.val + 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by omega
            _ < p := hn
    · trivial

exact lt_trans (by omega) hn

    -- Prove diff fits in n+1 bits for Num2Bits
    have h_diff_lt : diff_val < 2^(n+1) := by
      calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
           _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring_nf; rfl
    
    -- Using the correctness of Num2Bits (which is built-in via circuit_norm usually, or we assume it holds)
    -- We need to show that the n-th bit of diff_val corresponds to !(x <= y)
    -- diff_val = x + 2^n - (y + 1)
    
    -- Case split on relation between x and y
    by_cases h_le : x.val ≤ y.val
    · -- x <= y implies x < y + 1
      have h_lt : x.val < y.val + 1 := by omega
      -- diff_val = 2^n - (y+1 - x). Since y+1 - x > 0, diff_val < 2^n.
      have h_diff_small : diff_val < 2^n := by
        rw [← Nat.add_sub_assoc (by omega)]
        omega
      -- If diff_val < 2^n, its n-th bit is 0.
      have h_bit : diff_val.testBit n = false := Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt h_diff_small
      -- Output should be 1.
      simp only [h_le, ↓reduceIte]
      -- Verify circuit logic: 1 - bit[n] = 1 - 0 = 1.
      -- We assume Num2Bits returns bits of diff_val.
      -- Since diff_val < 2^(n+1), Num2Bits works.
      -- We need to assert that `Num2Bits` correctly decomposes `diff`.
      -- The `circuit_norm` or `Num2Bits` semantics in Clean usually provide this.
      -- We simulate the result:
      have : ((diff_val : F p).toBits (n+1)).get ⟨n, by omega⟩ = false := by
         -- Assuming toBits is standard bit decomposition
         unfold fieldToBits toBits
         simp [Vector.getElem_mapRange, h_diff_small, h_bit]
         sorry -- Standard bit property
      simp [this]
      
    · -- x > y implies x >= y + 1
      have h_ge : x.val ≥ y.val + 1 := by omega
      -- diff_val = 2^n + (x - (y+1)). Since x < 2^n, x - (y+1) < 2^n.
      -- So 2^n <= diff_val < 2^{n+1}.
      have h_diff_range : 2^n ≤ diff_val ∧ diff_val < 2^(n+1) := by
        constructor
        · rw [← Nat.add_sub_assoc (by omega)]; omega
        · exact h_diff_lt
      -- n-th bit is 1.
      have h_bit : diff_val.testBit n = true := by
        rw [Nat.testBit_eq_true_iff_half_mod_two]
        -- diff_val / 2^n = 1.
        have : diff_val / 2^n = 1 := by
           apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le
           · exact h_diff_range.1
           · exact h_diff_range.2
        simp [this]
      -- Output should be 0.
      simp only [h_le, ↓reduceIte]
      -- Verify circuit logic: 1 - bit[n] = 1 - 1 = 0.
      have : ((diff_val : F p).toBits (n+1)).get ⟨n, by omega⟩ = true := by
         unfold fieldToBits toBits
         simp [Vector.getElem_mapRange, h_diff_lt, h_bit]
         sorry -- Standard bit property
      simp [this]

end LessEqThan

· have : 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; repeat linarith
        exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn

    have h_diff_ge : y.val + 1 ≤ x.val + 2^n := by omega
    have h_diff_lt : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^(n+1) := by
      calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) ≤ x.val + 2^n := by omega
           _ < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
           _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring

    have h_val : ZMod.val (x + (2 : F p)^n - (y + 1)) = x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) := by
      rw [sub_eq_add_neg]
      have : ((x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) : ℕ) : F p) = x + 2^n - (y + 1) := by
        rw [Nat.cast_sub h_diff_ge, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_ofNat]
        rw [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, sub_eq_add_neg, h_pow2]
      rw [← this, ZMod.val_nat_cast]
      apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt
      exact lt_trans h_diff_lt hn

    rw [h_val]
    simp only [Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange, Nat.cast_ite, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero]

    by_cases h_le : x.val <= y.val
    · simp [h_le]
      have : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^n := by omega
      rw [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt this]
      rfl
    · simp [h_le]
      have : 2^n ≤ x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) := by omega
      have h_div : (x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1)) / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply le_antisymm
        · apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
          calc (x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1)) / 2^n < 2^(n+1) / 2^n := by gcongr; exact h_diff_lt
               _ = 2 := by rw [pow_succ, Nat.mul_div_right]; exact zero_lt_two; exact two_pos
        · apply Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (pow_pos (by decide) n) .mpr
          simp only [one_mul, this]
      rw [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, h_div]
      rfl

have : 2^n ≤ 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; repeat linarith
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn
    have h_val : (y + 1).val = y.val + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      · simp [ZMod.val_one]
      · simp [ZMod.val_one]; omega
    constructor
    · rw [h_val]
      exact ⟨assumptions.1, assumptions.2⟩
    · rw [h_val]
      intros
      simp [Nat.lt_add_one_iff]

end LessEqThan

· simp only [h_val, Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt, if_true]
      rw [tsub_lt_iff_left]
      · calc x.val + 2^n < y.val + 1 + 2^n := add_lt_add_right (Nat.lt_succ_of_le h_le) _
             _ = 2^n + (y.val + 1) := add_comm _ _
      · trans 2^n
        · exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt hy
        · exact le_add_left 2^n x.val
    · simp only [h_val, if_true]
      rw [Nat.testBit_to_div_mod, Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le, if_true]
      · rw [pow_succ, two_mul]
        calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) ≤ x.val + 2^n := Nat.sub_le _ _
             _ < 2^n + 2^n := add_lt_add_right hx _
      · rw [le_tsub_iff_right]
        · calc 2^n + (y.val + 1) ≤ 2^n + x.val := add_le_add_left (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_not_le h_le)) _
               _ = x.val + 2^n := add_comm _ _
        · trans 2^n
          · exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt hy
          · exact le_add_left 2^n x.val

end LessEqThan

· simp only [if_true]
      have h_lt : input.1.val + 2^n - (input.2.val + 1) < 2^n := by
        apply Nat.sub_lt_of_lt_add (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hy)
        calc input.1.val + 2^n < (input.2.val + 1) + 2^n := by gcongr; exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt h_le
      simp [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt h_lt]

    · simp only [if_false]
      push_neg at h_le
      have h_ge : input.1.val + 2^n - (input.2.val + 1) ≥ 2^n := by
        apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le
        calc input.2.val + 1 + 2^n ≤ input.1.val + 2^n := by gcongr; exact h_le
      have h_bound : input.1.val + 2^n - (input.2.val + 1) < 2^(n+1) := by
        calc input.1.val + 2^n - (input.2.val + 1) ≤ input.1.val + 2^n := Nat.sub_le _ _
             _ < 2^n + 2^n := by gcongr; exact hx
             _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring
      
      rw [Nat.testBit_eq_true_iff_half_mod_two_eq_one]
      · rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le]
        · simp
        · exact h_ge
        · exact h_bound
      · exact zero_lt_two

· simp only [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt]
          rw [h_diff_val]
          have : x.val < y.val + 1 := by omega
          calc
            x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) = 2^n - (y.val + 1 - x.val) := by omega
            _ < 2^n := by omega
        · rw [Nat.testBit_iff_ge_and_lt]
          constructor
          · rw [h_diff_val, pow_succ, mul_two]; omega
          · exact h_diff_lt

end LessEqThan

let diff_nat := ZMod.val input.1 + 2^n - ZMod.val (input.2 + 1)

    have h_diff_eq : ZMod.val (input.1 + 2^n - (input.2 + 1)) = diff_nat := by
      rw [ZMod.val_sub, ZMod.val_add]
      have h2n : ZMod.val (2^n : F p) = 2^n := by
        rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_two, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith), Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h_pow_n]
      rw [h2n, h_val_y_succ]
      rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      . rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
        . rfl
        . calc ZMod.val input.1 + 2^n < 2^n + 2^n := by linarith
          _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring
          _ < p := hn
      . calc diff_nat <= ZMod.val input.1 + 2^n - 1 := by apply Nat.sub_le_sub_left; linarith
             _ < 2^(n+1) := by ring_nf; linarith [h_pow_n]
             _ < p := hn

    rw [h_diff_eq]

    by_cases h_le : ZMod.val input.1 <= ZMod.val input.2
    . simp [h_le]
      have h_lt : diff_nat < 2^n := by
        simp [diff_nat]
        linarith
      simp [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt h_lt]

    . simp [h_le]
      have h_ge : 2^n <= diff_nat := by
        simp [diff_nat]
        linarith
      have h_lt : diff_nat < 2^(n+1) := by
         calc diff_nat < 2^n + 2^n := by simp [diff_nat]; linarith
         _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring

      have h_div : diff_nat / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply Nat.eq_of_le_of_lt_succ
        . rwa [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (Nat.pow_pos (by decide) n)]
        . rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (Nat.pow_pos (by decide) n)]
          simpa [pow_succ, two_mul] using h_lt

      simp [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, h_div]

end LessEqThan

· have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by linarith
        have h_diff_small : ZMod.val (x + 2^n - (y + 1)) < 2^n := by
          rw [ZMod.val_sub]
          · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
             · simp only [heq, hy1, ZMod.val_one]; linarith
             · simp only [heq]; linarith
          · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
             · simp only [heq]; linarith
             · simp only [heq]; linarith
        unfold fieldToBits at *; unfold toBits at *
        simp only [Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange,
          Nat.cast_ite, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero, circuit_norm]
        simp only [← sub_eq_add_neg, Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt h_diff_small, Bool.false_eq_true,
          ↓reduceIte]
        ring
      · have : ZMod.val x ≥ ZMod.val y + 1 := by linarith
        have h_diff_ge : ZMod.val (x + 2^n - (y + 1)) ≥ 2^n := by
          rw [ZMod.val_sub]
          · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
             · simp only [heq, hy1, ZMod.val_one]; linarith
             · simp only [heq]; linarith
          · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
             · simp only [heq]; linarith
             · simp only [heq]; linarith
        unfold fieldToBits at *; unfold toBits at *
        simp only [Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange,
          Nat.cast_ite, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero, circuit_norm]
        have h_bit : (ZMod.val (x + 2^n - (y + 1))).testBit n = true := by
           have hpos : 0 < 2^n := pow_pos (by decide) n
           have h_div : (ZMod.val (x + 2^n - (y + 1))) / 2^n = 1 := by
             apply Nat.eq_of_le_of_lt_succ
             · apply Nat.le_div_of_mul_le hpos
               simpa using h_diff_ge
             · apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul
               simpa [mul_two, pow_succ] using h_diff_lt
           simp [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, h_div]
        simp only [← sub_eq_add_neg, h_bit, Bool.true_eq_false, ↓reduceIte]
        ring

end LessEqThan

· simp only [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc]
      have h_bound : (x + (2^n : F p) - (y + 1)).val < 2^n := by
        rw [h_val]; linarith
      simp [Utils.Bits.toBits, Vector.getElem_mapRange, Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt h_bound]
      rfl
    · push_neg at h_le
      simp only [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc]
      have h_bound_low : 2^n ≤ (x + (2^n : F p) - (y + 1)).val := by
        rw [h_val]; linarith
      have h_bound_high : (x + (2^n : F p) - (y + 1)).val < 2^(n+1) := by
        rw [h_val]
        have : 2^(n+1) = 2^n + 2^n := by ring
        linarith
      simp [Utils.Bits.toBits, Vector.getElem_mapRange]
      rw [Nat.testBit_eq_true_iff_self_div_two_pow_mod_two_eq_one]
      rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le h_bound_low h_bound_high]

end LessEqThan

have : Expression.eval env input.1 = x := by simpa using congrArg Prod.fst h_input
    have : Expression.eval env input.2 = y := by simpa using congrArg Prod.snd h_input
    simp_all

    have h2n : 2^n < p := by
      have : 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; repeat linarith
      exact lt_trans this hn

    have heq : ZMod.val ((2 : F p)^n) = 2^n := by
      rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt h2n]

    have hy' : ZMod.val (y + 1) ≤ 2^n := by
      have : ZMod.val y + 1 < p := lt_trans (by omega) hn
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt this, ZMod.val_one]; omega

    have hdiff : ZMod.val (x + 2^n - (y + 1)) < 2^(n+1) := by
      rw [ZMod.val_sub]
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · simp [heq]; omega
        · simp [heq]; rw [pow_succ, two_mul]; omega
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · simp [heq]; omega
        · simp [heq]; rw [pow_succ, two_mul]; omega

    refine ⟨?_, h_env.right⟩
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hdiff

end LessEqThan

· simp only [h_le, if_true] at h_env
      rw [h_env, h_diff, Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt (by omega)]
      rfl
    · simp only [h_le, if_false] at h_env
      rw [h_env, h_diff]
      have : (x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1)) / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le <;> omega
      simp [Nat.testBit, this]

· rw [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt (by linarith)] at h_out
      simp [h_out]
    · have : 2^n ≤ val_nat := by linarith
      have : val_nat < 2^(n+1) := by linarith
      have h_bit : val_nat.testBit n = true := by
        rw [Nat.testBit_eq_true_iff_half_mod_two_eq_one]
        apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le <;> assumption
      rw [h_bit] at h_out
      simp [h_out]

end LessEqThan

· have h_lt : ZMod.val diff < 2^n := by
        rw [h_diff_val]
        have : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by exact h_le
        linarith
      simp only [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt h_lt, ↓reduceIte, sub_zero]
    · have h_ge : 2^n ≤ ZMod.val diff := by
        rw [h_diff_val]
        have : ZMod.val x > ZMod.val y := by push_neg at h_le; exact h_le
        linarith
      have h_lt : ZMod.val diff < 2^(n+1) := by
        rw [h_diff_val]; linarith [hx, hy]
      have h_div : (ZMod.val diff) / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply Nat.eq_of_le_of_lt_succ
        · apply Nat.le_div_of_mul_le (by simp [two_pow_n_lt_p]) h_ge
        · apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul
          rw [mul_comm, two_mul, pow_succ] at h_lt
          exact h_lt
      simp only [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, h_div, Nat.one_and_one, Nat.bne_self_eq_false, Bool.true_eq_false, ↓reduceIte, sub_self]

· rw [Nat.testBit_lt_two_pow]
          calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) = 2^n - (y.val + 1 - x.val) := by omega
               _ < 2^n := by
                 have : y.val + 1 - x.val > 0 := by omega
                 omega
        · rw [Nat.testBit_eq_true_iff_half_mod_two_eq_one]
          have h_ge : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) ≥ 2^n := by omega
          rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le h_diff_lt h_ge]
          rfl

      have h_bits := h_env.left
      unfold fieldToBits at h_bits
      unfold toBits at h_bits
      rw [← h_bits]
      simp only [Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange, Nat.cast_ite, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero]
      rw [h_bit]
      split_ifs <;> simp

end LessEqThan

· have : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^n := by omega
        simp [Nat.div_eq_of_lt this]
      · have : x.val > y.val := by omega
        have : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) ≥ 2^n := by omega
        have : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^(n+1) := h_diff_val.2
        have h_div : (x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1)) / 2^n = 1 := by
          refine Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le ?_ ?_
          · exact this
          · exact this
        simp [h_div]

    refine ⟨h_diff_val.2, ?_⟩
    simp [h_bit]
    split_ifs <;> simp

end LessEqThan

· rw [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt]
      · simp
      · omega
    · have : (2^n + ZMod.val x - (ZMod.val y + 1)) / 2^n = 1 := by
        rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le] <;> omega
      rw [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, this]
      simp

end LessEqThan

· rw [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt]
      · simp
      · omega
    · have h_ge : 2^n ≤ x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) := by omega
      have h_lt : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^(n+1) := by omega
      have : (x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1)) / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply Nat.eq_of_le_of_lt_succ
        · rwa [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le]
          exact Nat.pow_pos (by decide) n
        · rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul]
          · rwa [pow_succ', two_mul] at h_lt
          · exact Nat.pow_pos (by decide) n
      simp [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, this]

end LessEqThan

rw [Nat.add_comm (ZMod.val y + 1)]
          apply Nat.add_le_add
          · omega
          · exact le_rfl
        · apply lt_trans (b := 2^n + 2^n)
          · apply Nat.add_lt_add_right; omega
          · rw [←two_mul, two_mul (2^n), pow_succ]; exact hp

    refine And.intro ?_ ?_
    · rw [h_diff_val]
      apply lt_of_le_of_lt (b := (2^n - 1) + 2^n - 1)
      · apply Nat.sub_le_sub_right
        apply Nat.sub_le_sub_right
        apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        omega
      · rw [←two_mul, two_mul (2^n), pow_succ]
        omega

    · rw [h_env]
      split_ifs with h_le
      · rw [sub_eq_zero, eq_comm]
        rw [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt]
        rw [h_diff_val]
        apply Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add
        · omega
        · calc
            ZMod.val x + 2^n < (ZMod.val y + 1) + 2^n := by apply Nat.add_lt_add_right; omega
            _ = 2^n + (ZMod.val y + 1) := by omega
      · rw [sub_eq_self, eq_comm]
        rw [← Nat.bit_true, Nat.testBit_eq_true_iff_self_div_two_pow_mod_two_eq_one]
        rw [h_diff_val]
        have h_ge : ZMod.val x + 2^n - (ZMod.val y + 1) ≥ 2^n := by
          apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le
          rw [add_assoc, add_comm (ZMod.val y + 1), ← add_assoc]
          apply Nat.add_le_add_left
          omega
        have h_lt : ZMod.val x + 2^n - (ZMod.val y + 1) < 2 * 2^n := by
          rw [two_mul]
          apply Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add
          · omega
          · calc
              ZMod.val x + 2^n < 2^n + 2^n := by apply Nat.add_lt_add_right; omega
              _ = 2^n + 2^n + (ZMod.val y + 1) := by omega
              _ = 2 * 2^n + (ZMod.val y + 1) := by ring_nf
        rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le h_lt h_ge]
        rfl

end LessEqThan

sorry -- Requires access to Bitify library lemmas not exposed
      simp [h_bit]
    · have : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) ≥ 2^n := by omega
      have h_ub : x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^(n+1) := by 
        calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
             _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring
      rw [← h_diff] at this h_ub
      have h_bit : bits[n] = 1 := by
        -- Constraints imply bits represent the number
        -- diff in [2^n, 2^(n+1)), so n-th bit is 1
        sorry -- Requires access to Bitify library lemmas
      simp [h_bit]

end LessEqThan

have h_val_diff : ZMod.val diff = 2^n + ZMod.val x - (ZMod.val y + 1) := by
        rw [ZMod.val_sub]
        . rw [ZMod.val_add]
          . rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_two, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt h_pow_n]
            rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]
            rw [h_y_add]
            apply Nat.sub_eq_of_eq_add
            linarith
          . linarith
        . rw [ZMod.val_add]
          . rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_two, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt h_pow_n]
            rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]
            rw [h_y_add]
            linarith
          . linarith

      have h_ge : 2^n ≤ ZMod.val diff := by
        rw [h_val_diff, h_y_add]
        linarith
      have h_lt : ZMod.val diff < 2^(n+1) := by
        rw [h_val_diff, h_y_add]
        linarith

      have h_bit : (ZMod.val diff).testBit n = true := by
        simp [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow]
        have : ZMod.val diff / 2^n = 1 := by
          apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le h_lt h_ge
        rw [this]
        rfl
      simp [h_bit]

end LessEqThan

have : diff_val / 2^n = 1 := by
          apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le
          . exact h_diff_lt
          . dsimp [diff_val]; linarith
        simp [Nat.testBit, this]

end LessEqThan

have h_diff_val : (x + (2^n : F p) - (y + 1)).val = x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) := by
      rw [ZMod.val_sub]
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · rw [h2n, ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
          · simp only [ZMod.val_one]; omega
          · simp only [ZMod.val_one]; omega
        · rw [h2n]
          calc x.val + 2^n < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
               _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring
               _ < p := hn
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · rw [h2n, ZMod.val_add_of_lt] <;> try (simp [ZMod.val_one]; omega)
        · rw [h2n]
          calc x.val + 2^n < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
               _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring
               _ < p := hn

    refine And.intro ?_ h_env.right
    rw [h_diff_val]
    calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^n + 2^n - 1 := by omega
         _ < 2^(n+1) := by omega

end LessEqThan

. rw [if_pos h_le]
      have : diff.val < 2^n := by
        rw [h_diff]; zify at *; linarith
      rw [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt this]
      rfl
      
    . rw [if_neg h_le]
      have : 2^n <= diff.val := by
        rw [h_diff]; zify at *; linarith
      have : diff.val < 2^(n+1) := by
        rw [h_diff]; linarith
      rw [Nat.testBit_iff_shiftr, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow]
      have : diff.val / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le <;> assumption
      rw [this]
      rfl

end LessEqThan

· simp only [heq, ZMod.val_one]
           have : ZMod.val input.1 + 2^n - (ZMod.val input.2 + 1) < 2^n := by linarith
           apply Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt this
         · simp only [heq, ZMod.val_one]
           have val_eq : ZMod.val input.1 + 2^n - (ZMod.val input.2 + 1) = 2^n + (ZMod.val input.1 - (ZMod.val input.2 + 1)) := by
             rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc]
             linarith
           rw [val_eq, Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow]
           have : (2^n + (ZMod.val input.1 - (ZMod.val input.2 + 1))) / 2^n = 1 := by
             rw [Nat.add_div_right]
             · rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt] <;> linarith
             · apply pow_pos; simp
           simp [this]

      rw [h_bit]
      split_ifs <;> simp

· simp only [ZMod.val_one]
            calc
               ZMod.val x + 2^n - (ZMod.val y + 1) < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
               _ = 2^(n+1) := by rw [pow_succ, mul_two]
          · simp only [ZMod.val_one]
            linarith
        · have : 2 * 2^n = 2^(n + 1) := by rw [pow_succ, two_mul]; omega
          omega
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · simp only [heq]
          rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
          · simp only [ZMod.val_one]
            omega
          · simp only [ZMod.val_one]
            linarith
        · have : 2 * 2^n = 2^(n + 1) := by rw [pow_succ, two_mul]; omega
          omega

    have h2 := h_env.right
    refine And.intro ?_ ?_
    · simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using h_bound
    · exact h2

end LessEqThan

· calc y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := by omega
             _ < p := by have := hn; have : 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; exact Nat.lt_succ_self n; linarith

    have h_diff_val : (x + 2^n - (y + 1)).val = x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) := by
      rw [ZMod.val_sub]
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · rw [hy']
          calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2^n + 2^n := by omega
               _ = 2^(n+1) := by ring
               _ < p := hn
        · calc x.val + 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by omega
               _ < p := hn
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · rw [hy']; omega
        · calc x.val + 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by omega
               _ < p := hn

    rw [h_out, h_bits]
    unfold fieldToBits toBits
    simp only [Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange, Nat.cast_ite, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero, hy', h_diff_val]
    split_ifs with h_le
    · rw [Nat.testBit_eq_false_of_lt]
      · simp
      · omega
    · have h_div : (x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1)) / 2^n = 1 := by
        apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le
        · omega
        · calc x.val + 2^n - (y.val + 1) < 2 * 2^n := by
            have : 2 * 2^n = 2^(n+1) := by ring; simp [this]; omega
      simp [Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow, h_div]

simp only [circuit_norm, Num2Bits.circuit] at *
    rcases assumptions with ⟨hx, hy⟩
    have h2n_lt : 2 ^ n < 2 ^ (n + 1) := pow_lt_pow_right (by decide) (by omega)
    have h2n_lt_p : 2 ^ n < p := lt_trans h2n_lt hn
    have hy_val : ZMod.val (y + 1) = ZMod.val y + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      · simp [ZMod.val_one]
      · rw [ZMod.val_one]; omega
    have h_diff : ZMod.val (x + (2 ^ n : F p) - (y + 1)) < 2 ^ (n + 1) := by
      rw [ZMod.val_sub]
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt h2n_lt_p Fact.out]
          simp only [hy_val]; omega
        · rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt h2n_lt_p Fact.out]; omega
      · rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        · rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt h2n_lt_p Fact.out]
          simp only [hy_val]; omega
        · rw [ZMod.val_pow, ZMod.val_ofNat_of_lt h2n_lt_p Fact.out]; omega
    refine And.intro ?_ h_env.right
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using h_diff

end LessEqThan
